bins.name: Forecasting tools for studies
bins.desc: The filer contends that probabilistic grid reliability forecasting, built on public EIA, weather, and LMP data, is accurate enough today to be incorporated into interconnection study processes.
quotes: forward-looking grid stress prediction, using publicly available data, is technically viable today and could inform interconnection study processes.

We score daily failure probability across 6 US RTOs using EIA demand, weather, and LMP congestion data. Our walk-forward validated model detects 87% of reliability events with a 13% false positive rate.

bins.name: RTO reliability prediction platform
bins.desc: Monza Tech's Sentinel Grid scores daily failure probability across six RTOs, detecting 87% of reliability events with a 13% false positive rate, and offers this capability as potential technical input to FERC rulemaking.
quotes: forward-looking grid stress prediction, using publicly available data, is technically viable today and could inform interconnection study processes.

We score daily failure probability across 6 US RTOs using EIA demand, weather, and LMP congestion data. Our walk-forward validated model detects 87% of reliability events with a 13% false positive rate.
